name: Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A.
description: Cementos Pacasmayo S.A.A. is a leading Peruvian cement company primarily engaged in the production, distribution, and sale of cement, concrete, clinker, precast concrete, and other construction materials. Operating mainly in the northern region of Peru, the company serves diverse infrastructure, commercial, and residential construction projects. It operates modern production facilities, including its main plants in Pacasmayo, Rioja, and Piura, and is committed to sustainable development and providing high-quality building solutions to support regional economic growth.
